arguments.argument: Allowing potentially harmful advice to persist, even temporarily, fundamentally violates the responsibility inherent in moderating a *mental health* support community.

This immediate silence stifles communication, potentially damaging their willingness to engage further and learn.

arguments.justification_for_response: A sudden, harsh moderation action can easily be perceived as censorship, further damaging communication within the community. It could lead to resentment and a reluctance to share openly, defeating the purpose of the support group.
